title: Department of Digital Technologies and Software
content:
Department of Digital Technologies and Software

Vision

As Üsküdar University Digital Technologies and Software Department, our vision is to ensure the most efficient use of digital technologies in education, research and learning activities and to bring our university to a leading position in digital transformation.

Mission:

As Üsküdar University Department of Digital Technologies and Software, our mission is to manage and develop our university's activities in the field of digital technologies and software, to update digital infrastructures and to ensure that our students and staff benefit from digital technologies in the best way. In addition, we carry out studies to encourage the use of digital technologies in education, research and learning activities, to increase the digital competencies of our staff and to bring our university to a leading position in digital transformation.
